channel.title: NOW — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on NOW (ServiceNow) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED NOW (+953%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) added NOW in Q4 2025 · 0.3% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: Chase Coleman: ADDED NOW (+609%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chase Coleman (Tiger Global Management) added NOW in Q4 2025 · 1.1% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Chase Coleman)

item.title: Bill Nygren: EXITED NOW (-100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Bill Nygren (Oakmark Funds) exited NOW in Q4 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Bill Nygren)

item.title: Polen Capital: ADDED NOW (+15%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Polen Capital (Polen Capital Management) added NOW in Q4 2025 · 7.8% of portfolio. Adding ServiceNow.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Polen Capital)

item.title: Bill Nygren: NEW POSITION NOW (+100%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Bill Nygren (Oakmark Funds) new position NOW in Q3 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.
